title: Vanilla: Reforged
description: Highly customizable optimization and QoL modpack
body:
**Highly customizable, vanilla-friendly optimization and QoL modpack.** From friends and world hosting to shaders and optimization, this modpack has **all essential mods**

## Information
- **To view all mods in the modpack, click on "Versions", select a version and scroll down.**
- **Want to change a mod's configuration? No problem, every mod in this modpack has a ModMenu config integration.**
- **This modpack also has resource packs and shader packs. You can enable them by going to:**
  - "Options/Resource Packs" for resource packs
  - "Options/Video Settings/Shaderpacks" for shader packs

**Found a bug or want to suggest a mod?**
- [Join my discord server!](https://discord.gg/DXtSQPVYzE)

## Recommended settings/hardware:
- RAM: 4GB+ if you have distant horizons LOD rendering enabled
- RAM: 2GB+ if you have distant horizons LOD rendering disabled
- CPU: Intel core/ultra 3+ or AMD Ryzen 3+
- GPU: Most internal graphics will perfom well
